backward_compatibility.rationale: User: 'Just make it clean — we don't need bandages.' All 100+ import sites will be rewritten to new sub-module paths.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: User confirmed: 'deleting old code is fine.' Monolith config.py will be deleted and replaced with config/ package.

option_selection.rationale: Hybrid 10-file decomposition. Unanimously approved. Groups natural difficulty+validation pair, splits ai_solve/solution_tree and analysis/infrastructure per governance RC-2/RC-3.

research_artifacts: Feature-Researcher subagent: import graph analysis, models/ inventory, existing initiatives review
